description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 16 hrs 32 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 2 hrs 23 mins. His WakaTime activity was mostly in Java (53%), along with Markdown (18%) and other languages (28%). The GitHub data shows no commits, pull requests, or new repos this week.
